'''鈭歷-p-dh-b''' ('''kavapdheboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbefit|unbefit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-p-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbefit|unbefit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-p-dh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kavapdheboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivapdheboko|thivapdheboko]] || [[word:jivapdheboko|jivapdheboko]] || [[word:shivapdheboko|shivapdheboko]] || [[word:kivapdheboko|kivapdheboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvapdheboko|thuthuvapdheboko]] || [[word:jujuvapdheboko|jujuvapdheboko]] || [[word:shushuvapdheboko|shushuvapdheboko]] || [[word:kukuvapdheboko|kukuvapdheboko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvapdheboko|thuvapdheboko]] || [[word:juvapdheboko|juvapdheboko]] || [[word:shuvapdheboko|shuvapdheboko]] || [[word:kuvapdheboko|kuvapdheboko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovapdheboko|thovapdheboko]] || [[word:jovapdheboko|jovapdheboko]] || [[word:shovapdheboko|shovapdheboko]] || [[word:kovapdheboko|kovapdheboko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavapdheboko|thathavapdheboko]] || [[word:jajavapdheboko|jajavapdheboko]] || [[word:shashavapdheboko|shashavapdheboko]] || [[word:kakavapdheboko|kakavapdheboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavapdheboko|thavapdheboko]] || [[word:javapdheboko|javapdheboko]] || [[word:shavapdheboko|shavapdheboko]] || [[word:kavapdheboko|kavapdheboko]]
|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavapdhebithi|shavapdhebithi]] || [[word:shavapdhebiji|shavapdhebiji]] || [[word:shavapdhebishi|shavapdhebishi]] || [[word:shavapdhebiki|shavapdhebiki]]
